manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Economics
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Two years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PhD
OTHER-SKILLS: Dancing
AVAILABILITY: In three months

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: ME:  Does the interviewer know what you have studied in your bachelor? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

message.reasoning:
The user is asking me if the interviewer knows what I studied in my bachelor's degree. Looking at the CV information provided, I have a Bachelor in Economics listed. The user said "The recruiter does not know about it yet" - meaning the recruiter hasn't seen my CV yet.

So the answer is "no" - the interviewer does not know what I studied in my bachelor because they haven't been given that information yet.

The user wants me to answer with "yes or no and then stop" - so just "no"
